hero.headline: Building with clarity, planning, and trust.
hero.subheadline: A Nepal-registered infrastructure company based in Kathmandu. We focus on helping clients plan, design, renovate, visualize, and build better spaces.

mission.headline: To make building decisions easier, clearer, and more trustworthy.
mission.body: Our mission is to help people in Nepal make smarter building decisions through better planning, clear design direction, budget-aware guidance, and practical execution support.

clarity.title: Clarity First
clarity.description: Clients should understand the plan, budget, scope, and steps before construction begins.

budget.title: Budget-Aware Planning
budget.description: We align design, materials, and execution with the client's budget range.

design.title: Design Before Build
design.description: We focus on visual direction and planning before moving into physical execution.

trust.title: Trust Through Process
trust.description: We build trust with communication, field understanding, and honest guidance.

stage.headline: We are newly established.
stage.body: CivoraX Infra is in its early stage. Completed project case studies will be added as real work becomes available.
